Class
Description
AbendCommand
 
AbendException
Exception thrown to indicate an abnormal end (abend) condition in the application.
AbendException
 
AbstractAccumManager<T>
 
AbstractCallCommand
 
AbstractCommand
 
AbstractCommand
 
AbstractCommand
 
AbstractCommandHandler
 
AbstractContainerCommand
 
AbstractDefineSubcommand
 
AbstractDocumentCommand
 
AbstractDocumentCommand.InsertMode
 
AbstractEmbeddedObject
 
AbstractEntrySequentialFile
Abstract class representing an entry-sequential VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file.
AbstractFile
Represents an abstract file with various operations for file handling and record management.
AbstractFileCommand
 
AbstractFunctionHandler
 
AbstractFunctionHandler.ReturnTransidImmediate
 
AbstractIcetoolCommand
 
AbstractIOClass
 
AbstractJobEditCommand
 
AbstractKeySequentialFile
Represents an abstract base class for Key-Sequenced Data Set (KSDS) and Alternate Index (AIX) file handling within a VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) system.
AbstractKeySequentialFile.Key
 
AbstractLuCommand
 
AbstractNDecimal
AbstractNDecimal is an abstract class designed to handle numeric values with a specified number of significant digits and adjustable decimal precision.
AbstractNElementary
AbstractNElementary represents an abstract definition for an elementary field within a memory structure.
AbstractNField
Represents an abstract class for managing and manipulating memory fields.
AbstractNField.Justified
 
AbstractNFloatingPoint
AbstractNFloatingPoint is an abstract class representing a floating-point numeric data type.
AbstractNNumeric
Represents an abstract representation of a numeric field.
AbstractNSqlCommand
This abstract class represents a SQL command.
AbstractOnlineProgram
Represents an abstract online program for processing transactions or specific logic in an online context.
AbstractOnlineProgram.ISectionDelegate
 
AbstractOutrec
 
AbstractOutrecItems
 
AbstractProcessInvoker
 
AbstractProgram
The AbstractProgram class serves as a base class for defining procedural programs that interact with a runtime context, working storage, and system input/output.
AbstractProgram.ISectionDelegate
functional interface for SECTION delegates
AbstractQueueCommand
 
AbstractRecordFilter
 
AbstractRecordRelativeFile
Represents an abstract base class for handling relative record datasets (RRDS) in a VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organization.
AbstractRedisService
 
AbstractResource
 
AbstractResponse
This is an abstract class named AbstractResponse.
AbstractSpoolCommand
 
AbstractSqlApi
 
AbstractTcpServiceThread
 
AbstractUtility
 
AbstractVsamFile
AbstractVsamFile serves as a base class for implementing various types of VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file operations.

BigDecimalValue
The BigDecimalValue class encapsulates a BigDecimal value and provides utility methods for interacting with it.

CacheManager
 
CacheMode
 
CastType
 
Catalog
The Catalog class provides functionality to manage and interact with a catalog, including operations such as file retrieval, storage, definition, deletion, and querying the contents of the catalog.
CatalogApiBuilder
 
CatalogCommand
 
CatalogEntryCustomizer
A customization registry for FileDescriptor objects.
CatalogEntryNotFoundException
Exception that indicates a specific catalog entry was not found.
CatalogEntryType
Enumerates the different types of entries that can exist within a catalog, typically reflecting VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) or related mainframe dataset structures.
CatalogException
Base exception class for all catalog-related errors.
CbiderrException
 
CcerrorException
 
CEEDAYS
 
ChangedException
 
Channel
This class represents a Channel.

Console based SYSIN, SYSOUT and SYSLOG implementation

Utility class for redirecting console output to a file or logging framework.

Represents a container for holding data, typically used for communication with external systems.

IAddress

IAuthorizationProvider
 
IBackbone
IBackbone interface provides a set of methods for managing various resources.
IBackboneAtomicLong
The IBackboneAtomicLong interface provides a set of methods for managing an atomic long value.
IBackboneBinaryStream
The IBackboneBinaryStream interface provides a set of methods for managing a binary stream.
IBackboneBucket<T>
The IBackboneBucket interface provides a set of methods for managing a bucket.
IBackboneDeque<T>
The IBackboneDeque interface provides a set of methods for managing a double-ended queue (deque).
IBackboneList<T>
The IBackboneList interface provides a set of methods for managing a list.
IBackboneLock
The IBackboneLock interface provides a set of methods for managing a lock.
IBackboneMap<K,O>
The IBackboneMap interface provides a set of methods for managing a map.
IBackboneMapCache<K,V>
The IBackboneMapCache interface provides a set of methods for managing a cached map.
IBackboneMessageListener<T>
The IBackboneMessageListener interface provides a method for handling messages of a specific type.
IBackboneMessageQueue<T>
The IBackboneMessageQueue interface provides a set of methods for managing a message queue.
IBackboneObject
The IBackboneObject interface provides a set of methods that are common to all backbone objects.
IBackboneQueue<T>
The IBackboneQueue interface provides a set of methods for managing a queue.
IBackboneScheduler
The IBackboneScheduler interface provides a method for scheduling tasks.
IBackboneTopic<T>

Interface for file catalog management operations.

IdcamsParserBaseListener
This class provides an empty implementation of IdcamsParserListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
IdcamsParserListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by IdcamsParser.

The IEnvironment interface provides a generic environment for N.I.B.

This class provides an empty implementation of IkjeftParserListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

This interface defines a sequential I/O API for performing basic file or resource operations such as opening, reading, writing, flushing, and closing resources.

ISupernautCobolContext
Interface for managing a context for Supernaut COBOL processing.
ISupernautCobolRuntime
Interface for the Supernaut COBOL Runtime System (RTS).
ISupernautGateway
ISupernautGateway serves as an interface for communication with a Supernaut Transaction Gateway.
ISupernautTmExtension
 
ISysIn
ISysIn is an interface designed for handling input operations.
ISysLog
Interface defining methods for logging messages to a system log (SYSLOG).
ISysOut
Represents a system output handler interface for writing messages to SYSOUT.
ITDSubSystem
 
ItemerrException
 
ITerminalHandler<T>
 
ITerminalInputStream

Interface representing the API for interacting with VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) files.

KeyComparator
 
KeyIs
Represents types of key operations in a Key Sequenced Data Set (KSDS) context.
KeyNotFoundException
Exception indicating that a key was not found during file operations.
KeyOutOfSequenceException
 
KeyPointer
 
KeySequentialFile
Represents a key-sequential file object, facilitating operations such as reading, writing, and modifying records within the file.
KsdsKey
Represents a key in a Key Sequenced Data Set (KSDS) in a VSAM environment.

LengerrException
 
LicenseManager

LineReader
 
Link

MapSet
Represents a BMS Mapset.
Memory
The Memory class represents a memory area that can be allocated, deallocated, and manipulated.
MergeCommand
 
MessageDescriptor
 
MicroFocusFileHeader
Represents the header of a Micro Focus data file, encapsulating information such as header data, organization, recording mode, maximum record length, and minimum record length.

ModeliderrException
 
MongoDbLongTermStorage
 
Motorhead
 
MotorheadAdmin

MsSqlApi
 
MySqlApi
 
NAddress
The NAddress class represents an address in a memory area.
NameerrorException
 
NBinary
NBinary is a subclass of AbstractNElementary and represents a binary field in memory with specific behavior and customizations.
NChar
Represents a character-based data structure that provides functionality for handling string, byte, and character values.
NCharBin
The NCharBin class extends the functionality of the NChar class.
NCharInspected
The NCharInspected class extends the NChar class by providing additional functionality to inspect and replace characters or substrings within the character sequence.
NDouble
NDouble is a concrete implementation of the AbstractNFloatingPoint class, representing a double-precision floating-point numeric data type.
NetnameiderrException
 
NewLineFinder
 
NewPassRequiredException
 
NFieldAliases
Triggers the generation of the program alias helper.
NFieldAliasesProcessor
 
NFloat
The NFloat class represents a single-precision floating-point numeric type.
NGroup
The NGroup class is a representation of a storage group that allows for hierarchical data organization and manipulation.
NHostVariable
This class represents a host variable in SQL.
NHostVariablesList
 
NHostVariablesMap
This class extends HashMap and is used to map a String key to an NHostVariable object.
NIBBPXBT
 
NIBBR14
 
NIBCAMS
 
NIBCAMS1

NibcamsException

NIBTOOL
 
NibVsamCommandLine
 
NIBWTO
 
NIBXSORT
 
NIndex
Represents an integer-based index with operations for arithmetic manipulation and comparison against various types of numeric inputs.
NInt16
Represents a signed 16-bit integer (2-byte) data type.
NInt32
Represents a 32-bit signed integer within the numeric data types hierarchy.
NInt64
The NInt64 class represents a 64-bit signed integer data type.
NInteger
The NInteger class provides an implementation for handling numeric integer variables.
NodeCommand
 
NodeiderrException
 
NodeInfo
 
NodeInfo
This class represents the information of a node in the system.
NodeShutdownCommand
 
NodeShutdownRequest
 
NodeStatus

NodeType

NoMatchException
 
NonvalException

NostgException
 
NotallocException
 
NotauthException
 
NotAuthException
 
NotfinishedException
 
NotfndException
 
NotImplementedException
 
NotopenException
 
NPacked
The NPacked class represents a packed decimal data type typically used in memory-based numerical operations.
NPointer
Persistent pointer to a memory location.
NPointer.Size
The Size enum represents the size of a pointer with predefined constants.
NSqlCommand
NSqlCommand class extends AbstractNSqlCommand and provides methods to prepare and execute SQL commands.
NSqlCursor
NSqlCursor class extends NSqlCommand and provides methods to open, fetch, and close a cursor.
NSqlException
NSqlException class extends Exception and provides a custom exception for SQL errors.
NUInt16
The NUInt16 class represents an unsigned 16-bit integer.
NUInt32
The NUInt32 class represents a 32-bit unsigned integer in a specific data area structure.
NumericWithOptLeadingSignField
 
NVarcharField
The NVarcharField class is a data field representation that supports variable-length string values, with options to define and manage the maximum length of characters.
NZoned
Represents a numeric, zoned-decimal formatted field with support for variable length, decimal places, and optional signed values.
ObjectQualifier
 
ObservationsConfig

ProgramInit
Indicates that the annotated method is intended to be called during program initialization.
ProgramLanguage
 
ProgramNotFoundException
An exception indicating that a program was not found.
ProgramStorage
Indicates that the annotated field is intended to be used for program working storage, and therefore automatically allocated when the program is created and cancelled at CANCEL.

PutContainerCommand
 
QbusyException
 
QiderrException
 
QueueItem

Rba
Represents a Relative Buffer Address (RBA), which is a long value used to denote the position of a record within a file relative to the start of the file's buffer.

Record
A class representing a record with a configurable memory structure and length.
RecordAlreadyAllocatedException
This exception is thrown to indicate that an attempt was made to allocate a record that has already been allocated.
RecordbusyException
 
RecordFormat
An enumeration representing various record formats.
RecordRelativeFile
The RecordRelativeFile class extends the functionality of AbstractRecordRelativeFile and provides methods to handle relative record file operations, including reading, writing, rewriting, and deleting records.

An exception indicating a mismatch between program and N.I.B. runtime versions.
